scripts.format: prettier --write packages/**/*.ts && prettier --write internals/**/*.ts && prettier --write tests/**/*.ts
scripts.test:go: pnpm --filter @nestia/core --filter @nestia/sdk -r run test:go && cd packages/core/native && go test ./...
scripts.test: cross-env TTSC_GO_BINARY=go TTSC_CACHE_DIR=node_modules/.cache/ttsc NODE_OPTIONS="--no-experimental-strip-types --no-experimental-detect-module" pnpm build && cross-env TTSC_GO_BINARY=go TTSC_CACHE_DIR=node_modules/.cache/ttsc NODE_OPTIONS="--no-experimental-strip-types --no-experimental-detect-module" pnpm test:go && cross-env TTSC_GO_BINARY=go TTSC_CACHE_DIR=node_modules/.cache/ttsc NODE_OPTIONS="--no-experimental-strip-types --no-experimental-detect-module" pnpm --filter=./tests/test-* --workspace-concurrency=1 -r start
